meaning: adj.扭曲的,狡猾的,不直接说明的,转弯抹角的
examples: You can find the twisty image at.
One image ACTS as background, and one image ACTS as a twisty.
His twisty tube was a major achievement, so tricky to produce that many CFLs are still curled by hand.
Part of Herman Cain's appeal is that he's seen as a straight talker, not like those twisty politicians.
The ride was subdued and supple, yet the tautness was clearly there for spirited driving on twisty roads.
